Report

Saied Alimoradi

The revenue attribution is what stands out to me here. Most privacy-friendly analytics stop at pageviews, and then you can never show which content actually made money.

Two questions from the content side. How do you handle organic search as a source? Without cookies you usually just get "google.com" and no idea which page or query brought them. And do you separate AI referrals — ChatGPT, Perplexity, and so on? A lot of that traffic arrives with no referrer, and right now it's the thing people most want to see and mostly can't.

Also the dashboards look clean, which is rare in this category. Nice work.

Report

Gal Dayan [...] Report

Faruk Alay

Love how clean the dashboard feels without sacrificing depth, especially seeing revenue and funnels tied together right next to traffic sources. The cookie-less setup is such a relief compared to wrestling with consent banners.

Report

Sinan Simay

Finally an analytics tool that doesn't need a cookie banner. Set it up in like two minutes and the dashboard is honestly cleaner than what I'm using now.

Report

Animesh from Leedlime

I've tried a lot of analytics platforms but most of them were bloated and boring.  
  
Kobbe is the first platform which is built on simplicity and design aesthetics in my experience and of course privacy.  
  
Congratulations on the launch @michael\_andreuzza, wishing you loads of success with Kobbe!!

Report

results.title: Usermaven Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
I recently tried Usermaven and I have to say, I am extremely impressed with this analytics tracking tool. One of the standout features for me was the privacy-friendly website analytics. It was so refreshing to use a tool that didn’t compromise on user privacy. But that’s not all - Usermaven also offers product insights specifically tailored for SaaS businesses, which is perfect if you’re looking to improve your product offering. The funnel analysis feature is also incredibly useful for understanding how users are interacting with your site and where they might be dropping off. Another great feature is the marketing attribution tracking, which makes it easy to see which marketing channels are driving the most traffic and conversions for your business. And if you need more detailed insights [...] Report

I think Usermaven is a great addition to my tool stack. It allows me to get a deep dive into the customers intent and am able to better understand any road blocks or areas within my app that customers are not liking or are causing delays. White labeling allows me to get around blockers. I am really glad I found Usermaven.
